Geocache Description:

A quick drive-by for most of the year, but a treat is in store if you visit in late January, through February or into the early part of March..

The cache is a smallish, cammo-taped lock'n'lock with a few small swaps. There is a prize for first to find sitting next to the cache.

This spot is one we always enjoy driving past in late January as it reminds us that there will be another spring, we just have to wait a little longer!

Additional Hints (No hints available.)
